candidate_summary: PRAYER-FLAG: fixed-ordered 5-axis (BLUE factuality-closed, WHITE factuality-open, RED reasoning, GREEN safety, YELLOW instruction-following) LLM evaluation-diagnostic with 3 sub-components per axis (correctness, calibration, robustness) producing a 5x3=15-d prescribed-order vector, plus dependency-conditional downstream evaluation (axis i only evaluated if axes <i pass thresholds). Claims novelty by recombining (i) fixed-order 5 axes, (ii) 3-component per axis, (iii) dependency-conditional gating.

results_analysis.title: HELM (Stanford CRFM)
results_analysis.rationale: HELM is the canonical multi-axis LLM diagnostic vector covering 7 axes including the exact (accuracy, calibration, robustness) triple PRAYER-FLAG names as per-axis sub-components. All three signals fire (kw=2, sem=0.86, func=0.84). Lacks prescribed order, but functional cluster is the same multi-dim diagnostic.

results_analysis.title: HELM benchmark Comprehensive LLM evaluation with gating
kw_matches: dependency-conditional downstream evaluation (block on toxicity/bias regressions, warn on efficiency)
results_analysis.rationale: EXACT match for PRAYER-FLAG's dependency-conditional axis. HELM-with-gating already implements upstream-blocking / conditional downstream evaluation. All three signals fire.

results_analysis.title: HiBench: Hierarchical Structure Reasoning
results_analysis.rationale: Hierarchical (ordered/conditional) evaluation of LLM reasoning — same hierarchy-of-evaluation pattern. All three signals fire.

results_analysis.title: Cognitive Diagnostic Models for LLM
results_analysis.rationale: CDM gives finer-grained multi-attribute diagnostic of LLMs — same functional cluster (multi-axis diagnostic vector with per-attribute sub-scores). Lacks strict order. All three signals fire.

results_analysis.title: Survey on Evaluation of LLM-based Agents
results_analysis.rationale: 2D taxonomy decomposing eval along multiple axes; process-component captures the conditional-pipeline dimension. All three signals fire.

results_analysis.title: Benchmark2: Systematic Evaluation of LLM Benchmarks
kw_matches: systematic evaluation of LLM benchmarks (multi-axis meta-eval)
results_analysis.rationale: Semantic hit (0.72>=0.7) is sufficient under the OR rule, even though kw=1 and func<0.7.

results_analysis.title: Evaluation and Benchmarking of LLM Agents: A Survey
results_analysis.rationale: Generic agent-eval survey; no signal fires.

verdict_sentence: PRAYER-FLAG fails novelty: 6 of 8 retrieved results trigger at least one hit signal (kw>=2, sem>=0.7, or func>=0.7), far exceeding the threshold of 1; HELM (multi-axis multi-component diagnostic), HELM-with-gating (dependency-conditional), HiBench (hierarchical eval), CDM (multi-attribute diagnostic), and the agent-eval 2D taxonomy collectively cover all three claimed recombined components, so the candidate is not novel.
